rationale: An LLM at this capability ceiling (basic input validation exploitation) provides marginal assistance for Execution phase tasks requiring sophisticated EDR evasion. The LLM can generate basic scripts and recall documented techniques, saving time and reducing simple errors, but cannot handle the advanced obfuscation, memory injection, or adaptive evasion techniques needed against MIL2/MIL3 enterprises. This results in modest efficiency gains (+2-7 percentage points) rather than fundamental capability enhancement.
